calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Verified Answrs To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrrogatories And Mtn For Monetary Sanctions Of $896.00 As Against Pltf Dianne Lee And Attny Jason Lundberg
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GIOVANNIE PICO's Motion To Compel Verified Answrs To Form Interrogatories And Special Interrrogatories And Motion For Monetary Sanctions Of $896.00 As Against Plaintiff Dianne Lee And Attorney Jason Lundberg is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to serve verified responses no later than August 5, 2014. Defendant's request for sanctions against Diane Lee and her attorneys of record, Allegiance Law, is granted in the amount of $560.00. Sanctions to be paid to defendant Giovannie Pico and her attorney, Sandra K. Brislin, no later that August 5, 2014. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Pro Tem Katherine Gallo, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
